label: exp1_colony_36
comment: Experiment 1 high population within the assignment limit: same non-trivial finite-food map as the 12- and 24-ant runs, but with 36 ants. This remains below the required maximum of 40 ants and tests whether the strongest population in this group improves exploitation or starts to lose efficiency through local congestion.
hypothesis: The 36-ant colony should reach the highest total delivery, but its efficiency gain over 24 ants may be sublinear because the grid has obstacles and cell capacity limits.
